case_title: MICHAEL SAKURAI VS. ZAKIYA WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAKURAI, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ZAKIYA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-28-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-27-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-05-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-22-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-11-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 18112045)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-28-2018 CONTINUED TO APR-11-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-22-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
